404.title: Page not found
404.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist, has been moved, or the URL is incorrect.

429.title: Too many requests
429.body: You've made too many requests in a short time. Please wait before trying again.

500.body: Our team has been notified and is working on a fix. Please try again in a moment.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
